title: Session

resourceType.description: FHIR-style discriminator naming this resource type; MUST equal the resource type name.

pinnedAgentVersion.description: The immutable AgentDefinition version this Session was created against.

type.description: Discriminant identifying this as a mounted file.

fileId.description: Identifier of the file mounted into this session.

oneOf.description: A single file mounted into the session at create.

type.description: Discriminant identifying this as a mounted memory store.

storeId.description: Opaque identifier of the memory store mounted into this session.

oneOf.description: An opaque mounted memory store. v0 treats memory as an opaque resource; see Decisions taken.

type.description: Discriminant identifying this as a mounted GitHub repository.

owner.description: Owner (user or organization) of the mounted repository.

ref.description: Branch, tag, or commit SHA to mount; if absent, the provider mounts the default branch.

oneOf.description: A GitHub repository mounted into the session at create.

resources.description: Resources mounted into the session at create: files, memory stores, and/or GitHub repositories.

vaultIds.description: Identifiers of the Credentials attached to this session, matched to MCP servers by URL at creation.

description: A provider execution context, pinned to one agent version, disposable and replaceable.

version.description: The version number being pinned; keyed together with agentDefinitionId into an immutable AgentDefinitionVersion content snapshot.

AgentVersionRef.description: A pin to one version of an AgentDefinition, keyed into an immutable AgentDefinitionVersion content snapshot.
